title: Teamsterz Beast Machines Monster Jaws Scorpion Slam | Scorpion Car Launcher And Car Track Set | Monster Cars Playset With Die-Cast Car | Kid’s Play Figures And Vehicle Toy Transporter| Ages 3+
description: Product Description Teamsterz - Beast Machines Monster Jaws Scorpion Slam Unleash the Beast with the Monster Jaws Scorpion Slam playset! With its fierce scorpion-inspired design and unstoppable performance, this monster car is not just fast – it's a force to be reckoned with! Watch in awe as the car races through the track, smashing through obstacles, shattering barriers, and narrowly avoiding treacherous traps. Challenge each other to epic races, epic stunts, and unforgettable showdowns that will create lasting memories! Are you brave enough to battle the scorpion with Beast Machines Stinger Slam playset. Race up the track with the friction powered Monster Jaws truck included and crash through the barriers to face the scorpion. The brightly coloured, friction powered Monster Jaws truck features chomping jaws, high quality die-cast details and strong grip rubber tyres. Aiding the development of your little one’s cognitive and fine motor skills as they are the perfect size for push along play. SUITABLE FOR AGES 3+ THE PERFECT GIFT OR PRESENT This is the ideal toy for kids who are interested in Monsters, making this the perfect gift for any animal lover. Watch your child's face light up as they open this Scorpion Slam Monster Jaws. Let their imaginations go wild, by building tracks to race around or having the ultimate Monster attack that takes over your home. This set is ideal for birthday presents, Christmas present and stocking fillers. Our range of Monster toys are fantastic toys for kids aged 3+. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Includes 1x Teamsterz Beats Machines Monster Jaws Scorpion Slam & 1x Die-Cast Monster Truck Car. Each car features a high quality die-cast detail. Product Dimensions: H17.5cm x W13.4cm x D44.4cm. Suitable for all children aged 3+. TEAMSTERZ RANGE The Teamsterz Range offers an extensive range of collectable die-cast vehicles from their Monster Moverz Transporters, Emergency City and their Metro City range. Learning is made possible by the Teamsterz Range by interacting with their realistic light and sound vehicles. . We also want children to explore the world around them and find adventure in their own home and garden, so Teamsterz also offers a wide range of playsets, garages and track sets.
